VAS_D.Description: Visual Analogue Scale (VAS) rating for pain intensity of today, 0-100

VAS_WA.Description: Visual Analogue Scale (VAS) rating for average pain intensity in the past week, 0-100

VAS_WW.Description: Visual Analogue Scale (VAS) rating for worst pain intensity in the past week, 0-100

Levels.Nonpain: medication for non-pain symptoms, including antidepressants and anxiolytics

SFMPQ_T.Description: Short-form McGill Pain Questionnaire (SF-MPQ) total score, 0-45

SFMPQ_S.Description: Short-form McGill Pain Questionnaire (SF-MPQ) sensory score, 0-33

SFMPQ_A.Description: Short-form McGill Pain Questionnaire (SF-MPQ) affective score, 0-11

HADS_T.Description: Hospital Anxiety and Depression Scale (HADS) total score, 0-42

HADS_A.Description: Hospital Anxiety and Depression Scale (HADS) anxiety score, 0-21

HADS_D.Description: Hospital Anxiety and Depression Scale (HADS) depression score, 0-21
